reasons: Only agent with executable Python script (detect_divergence.py) present in revised workspace
Clear evidence of successful execution: imported akshare, retrieved ChiNext stocks, processed data, found stock 300413
Correct implementation of all task requirements: 30-day split (25+5), max high price comparison, 80% volume threshold, proper metric calculations
Result satisfies output contract: divergence.txt with correct format and one valid stock (300413,1.04,-23.64,24.68)
Implementation validated by peer agent (codex) through code audit before adoption
All three metrics meet criteria: price change positive (+1.04%), volume change negative (-23.64%), divergence positive (24.68%)
GA failed with API errors and copied peer results without independent verification
Openclaw failed due to network issues and produced no actual data
Codex adopted claudecode's result after validating the implementation logic
merge_notes: Claudecode provides the most reliable solution with executable code artifact and evidence of real data retrieval. The detect_divergence.py script correctly implements the divergence detection logic: splits 30 trading days into first 25 and last 5, uses maximum high price (not closing price) for price comparison, applies 80% threshold for volume shrinkage, and calculates all three required metrics per the task formula. The single result (stock 300413) satisfies all automated check criteria with positive price change, negative volume change, and positive divergence degree. While GA reported 4 stocks, it admitted to API failure and borrowed results from peers. Openclaw encountered network issues. Codex validated claudecode's approach and adopted their result, providing independent confirmation of the implementation quality. Claudecode's solution represents the only independently verifiable, executable artifact with concrete evidence of real market data processing.
